data.title: U.S. Treasury Abruptly Buys $10,000,000,000 of Its Own Debt in Massive, Historic Treasury Buyback
data.description:
The U. S. Treasury Department just issued the largest buyback of its own bonds in history. The Treasury says the $10 billion operation is designed to repurchase securities maturing between July 15th, 2025 and May 31st, 2027
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/07/u-s-treasury-abruptly-buys-10000000000-of-its-own-debt-in-massive-historic-treasury-buyback/

The interview came days after Musk launched a string of attacks on Trump over a tax and spending bill, which triggered one […]

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Uncertainty After Recent Highs
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin recently reached a historic high of $112,000 before falling below $105,000, raising doubts about its ability to hit the $150,000 target by the end of the year. Technical analysis indicates a bearish divergence in the weekly RSI chart, similar to the cycle top in 2021, suggesting a potential correction of over 50% with a target price around $64,000. Veteran trader Peter Brandt has warned that Bitcoin must return to its parabolic trend line to avoid ending the current bull market cycle. However, some analysts remain optimistic, believing that if the on-chain indicators NUPL/MVRV ratio surpass 1.0, the price could reach the $150,000 to $175,000 range. Currently, Bitcoin is seeking direction near $105,000.

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin may not reach $150,000 by the end of the year, technical indicators show it may face a sharp correction
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Analysts pointed out that Bitcoin recently hit a record high of $112,000 and then fell back to below $105,000, raising doubts in the market about whether the $150,000 target can be reached by the end of the year. Technical analysis shows that the weekly chart of Bitcoin shows a bearish RSI divergence similar to the top of the 2021 cycle, suggesting that it may face a correction of more than 50%, with a target price of about $64,000. Veteran trader Peter Brandt warned that Bitcoin needs to return to the parabolic trend line, otherwise it may end the current bull market cycle. However, some analysts are still optimistic about Bitcoin and believe that if the on-chain indicator NUPL/MVRV ratio breaks through 1.0, the price is expected to rush to the $150,000-175,000 range. Bitcoin is currently looking for direction around $105,000. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: "Jun Ji-hyun's husband lost 15 billion won in cryptocurrency trading" became a hot search on Weibo and Baidu
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News "Jun Ji-hyun's husband lost 15 billion won in cryptocurrency trading" has been on Weibo and Baidu hot searches, currently ranking 15th on Baidu's hot search list and 21st on Weibo's hot search list.
Earlier, Korean media Chosun revealed that Choi Joon Hyuk (최준혁, Choi Joon Hyuk), the husband of the famous Korean star Jun Ji-hyun, is the CEO of Alpha Asset Management. The private equity fund operator holds 35 billion won worth of shares in the listed company Wemade. The latter's virtual currency Wemix issued through its subsidiary has been removed from Korean cryptocurrency exchanges such as Upbit and Bithumb, and Wemade's stock price has also fallen sharply.

data.title: Gemini Aims for Wall Street: Winklevoss Twins File for IPO
data.description:
Gemini, the crypto exchange built by everyone’s favorite identical twins, Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss, just quietly took a major step toward going public. They’ve filed confidentially for an IPO, and if all goes well, we could see Gemini trading on a traditional stock exchange sometime soon. Timing It Just Right Let’s be honest, crypto companies.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/gemini-aims-for-wall-street-winklevoss-twins-file-for-ipo/
